name: Feature request

---

## Problem

What developer or clinician-review workflow problem would this solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the smallest useful version.

## Out of scope

What should this feature not do?

## Safety notes

Confirm this does not create autonomous diagnosis, dosing, emergency instructions, or surgery-clearance behavior.
